prompt: We just had a production outage for 2 hours because the auth service couldn't handle the traffic spike during the product launch. The cache layer failed and auth tokens expired prematurely. Can you help me do a postmortem and capture lessons learned?

assertions.name: has_current_context
assertions.check: Contains '## Current context' with incident facts

assertions.name: has_verification_risks
assertions.description: Has Verification > Risks and failure modes

assertions.name: has_lessons_prompting
assertions.description: Has Lessons learned > Prompting and coordination
